_about: Tencent (0700.HK) CORE OPERATING BUSINESS intrinsic DCF, in RMB millions. Excludes the investment portfolio and net cash (those are added in tencent.sotp.json). cash/debt set to 0 so the DCF's operating_asset_value IS the core operating value used by sotp.py. Data ~FY2025, see source notes; refine FY2025 full-year on release.
_units: RMB millions; rates decimal; shares in millions
_sources: Tencent FY2024 results (PRNewswire 2025-03-19), Q1/Q3 2025 results; FY2025 revenue +14% est.
_driver1_growth: Base = FY2025E revenue ~RMB750bn. Blended segment growth: Ads (AI-driven, high-teens) + Games (mid) + FinTech&Business (low-double). Declines from 12% to a 3% terminal over 10y (~7.9% CAGR; year-10 ~RMB1.6tn).
_driver2_margin: Non-IFRS operating margin ~36% (FY24), expanding to a ~40% target by 2029 on mix shift to high-margin AI-driven ads + operating leverage.
_driver3_reinvestment: Capital-light platform (high FCF conversion ~24%); sales-to-capital 2.5 even with rising AI capex. Reinvestment = change-in-revenue / 2.5.
_driver4_risk: China-exposed equity. Effective tax ~16% (software/HNTE incentives) ramping to a 22% marginal blend. Cost of capital ~9% (China riskfree ~2-3% + ERP x beta), gliding to a mature ~8.5%. SENSITIVITY 8-11% shown in report.
_terminal: Stable growth 3% (>= China low riskfree but <= nominal GDP). Terminal ROC 15% reflects an asset-light WeChat/gaming moat earning durable excess returns (reinvestment rate = 3%/15% = 20%).
_bridge: cash/debt/minority = 0 here ON PURPOSE: operating_asset_value is the CORE value; net cash + investments are added in the SOTP step. Shares ~9,238M (post 2024-25 buybacks).
